name: Rosemount International School
tagline: Nurturing early learners through inquiry-based education in a warm, supportive setting
description: Rosemount International School, established in 1999, is a small private international school in Siglap dedicated to early childhood and junior primary education for children aged 3 to 8. Formerly known as Rosemount Kindergarten, the school follows an inquiry-based, developmental approach that encourages curiosity, discovery, and communication. With a student-centred philosophy and teachers recruited from top international schools worldwide, Rosemount provides a nurturing environment where young learners build strong foundations in literacy, numeracy, and social-emotional skills before transitioning to larger primary schools.

admission.process: Parents submit an application and attend a school tour. Children participate in a gentle observation session to assess readiness, and families meet with the head of school before an offer is made.
admission.deadlines: Rolling admissions. Main intake in August. Early application recommended as class sizes are limited.

faqs.question: What ages does Rosemount serve?
faqs.answer: Rosemount serves children aged 3 to 8 years, covering Preparatory 1 through Grade 2. It is an early childhood and junior primary school, and families typically transition to larger schools from Grade 3 onwards.

faqs.question: How does inquiry-based learning work at Rosemount?
faqs.answer: Teachers design interdisciplinary units around children's questions and interests. Students learn by exploring real-world themes, developing research and communication skills through hands-on projects rather than rote instruction.

seo.description: Rosemount International School in Siglap: Inquiry-based early years education for ages 3-8. Small classes, nurturing environment. View 2026 fees, curriculum and admissions.
